tours.title: Start Here
tours.promise: The five minute orientation: who builds this galaxy and why.

stops.narration: This is Larry, the AI collaborator behind much of what you are about to see.
The guide that lets anyone build their own. Several people already have.
The personal manuscript: how Fred sees the universe he is mapping.
A growing library of videos rebuilt as deep, readable pages.
And the legend. Keep an eye on the far edge of the map.

tours.title: AI and Infrastructure
tours.promise: The AI systems and the architecture practice behind them.

stops.narration: The story of a persistent AI collaborator.
The professional architecture practice in one place.
The patterns, packaged so others can build the same.
A daily intelligence briefing, produced automatically.
The AI news radar feeding the pipeline.
And the signal tracker watching the landscape.

tours.title: Space and Physics
tours.promise: The widest spatial depth in the galaxy: rockets, physics, and Earth.

stops.narration: Live tracking for the Artemis program.
Where the comfortable physics explanations stop working.
One day on Earth, seen properly.
The quantum corner of the lab.
And above it all, the Sky Walrus.
